'''nafungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivoroid|ivoroid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-f-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivoroid|ivoroid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nafungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næfingith|næfingith]] || [[word:næfingij|næfingij]] || [[word:næfingish|næfingish]] || [[word:næfingi|næfingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nafufunguth|nafufunguth]] || [[word:nafufunguj|nafufunguj]] || [[word:nafufungush|nafufungush]] || [[word:nafufungu|nafufungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nafunguth|nafunguth]] || [[word:nafunguj|nafunguj]] || [[word:nafungush|nafungush]] || [[word:nafungu|nafungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nafufnguth|nafufnguth]] || [[word:nafufnguj|nafufnguj]] || [[word:nafufngush|nafufngush]] || [[word:nafufnguf|nafufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nafunguthu|nafunguthu]] || [[word:nafunguju|nafunguju]] || [[word:nafungushu|nafungushu]] || [[word:nafunguku|nafunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nafunguth|nafunguth]] || [[word:nafunguj|nafunguj]] || [[word:nafungush|nafungush]] || [[word:nafungu|nafungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nafunguthul|nafunguthul]] || [[word:nafungujul|nafungujul]] || [[word:nafungushul|nafungushul]] || [[word:nafungukul|nafungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nafunguthuthu|nafunguthuthu]] || [[word:nafungujuju|nafungujuju]] || [[word:nafungushushu|nafungushushu]] || [[word:nafunguku|nafunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nafunguthun|nafunguthun]] || [[word:nafungujun|nafungujun]] || [[word:nafungushun|nafungushun]] || [[word:nafungukun|nafungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nafunguthuoro|nafunguthuoro]] || [[word:nafungujuoro|nafungujuoro]] || [[word:nafungushuoro|nafungushuoro]] || [[word:nafungukuoro|nafungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
